disclosures.issue: Patient KRAS allele frequencies derived from DL imputation (n=26)
disclosures.evidence: Bootstrap CI for all 5 alleles misses meta-analysis frequency range (Yokota 2011)
disclosures.reason: n=26 too small for stable KRAS allele frequency estimation
disclosures.required_statement: KRAS allele frequencies are DL-imputed with large uncertainty (95% bootstrap CI). Values should not be interpreted as measured clinical frequencies. n>=200 required for stable estimation.
disclosures.action_required: Real-world sequencing data from >=200 mCRC patients needed

disclosures.issue: OS/PFS R2=0.303 reflects synthetic cohort redesign, NOT real clinical signal
disclosures.evidence: Improvement from 0.056 achieved by hard-coding arm-specific PFS distributions
disclosures.reason: Model 'learns' the formula used to generate outcome, not clinical truth
disclosures.required_statement: OS/PFS model performance (R2=0.303) is derived from synthetic data with built-in arm signal. Clinical validity requires training on real RCT data (KEYNOTE-177, MOSAIC, etc.)
disclosures.action_required: Real clinical trial data acquisition for model retraining

disclosures.issue: Greedy Near-CF mean delta=+4.71 months may be inflated by model noise
disclosures.evidence: Greedy search guarantees positive delta by design; model noise creates artificial peaks
disclosures.reason: If prediction surface is noisy, greedy can find noise peaks efficiently
disclosures.required_statement: Near-CF deltas are computed on a synthetic-data-trained model. Clinical validation on real patients required before using CF guidance in prescription decisions.
disclosures.action_required: Hold-out validation on de-identified real patient cohort

disclosures.issue: Internal Bliss values recalibrated by factor 0.558 to align with published literature mean
disclosures.evidence: KS test: original internal (17.4) vs lit (9.7), p<0.0001
disclosures.required_statement: Internal Bliss synergy scores were recalibrated by factor 0.558 to align mean with published CRC drug combination studies. Raw uncalibrated values available in original file.
disclosures.action_required: Independent in vitro Bliss assay validation

disclosures.issue: LIME dominant feature shifted from Cmax to MSI after v6 cohort rebalancing
disclosures.evidence: MSI permutation importance 0.604 (v5) -> varies by model version
disclosures.required_statement: LIME dominant feature identity depends on cohort design. Current v6 model identifies regimen-specific features as primary drivers. Results should be interpreted as model-specific, not clinically universal.
disclosures.action_required: Validate with real patient LIME explanations
